results.abstract: A synthetic cohort study fixture describing the association between sleep duration and academic performance in university students.
results.title: Sleep duration and academic performance in university students
results.takeaway: Students reporting longer consistent sleep had modestly higher course grades after adjustment for baseline workload.

results.abstract: A synthetic randomized trial fixture testing a sleep hygiene program before final examinations.
results.title: Sleep hygiene intervention before examinations
results.takeaway: The intervention improved sleep regularity and was associated with a small improvement in examination scores.

results.abstract: A synthetic systematic review fixture summarizing studies on sleep quality and student learning outcomes.
results.title: Sleep quality and learning outcomes: a systematic review
